name: Haute-Loire (France)
description: Red field within a scalloped border, charged with two white arms in blue sleeves issuing from the sides, the left holding a gold crosier and the right holding a white sword.
history: The arm with a crosier recalls the bishops of Le Puy and the arm with a sword the area's lay lordships.

features.role: two armoured arms holding a crosier and a sword on a red field within a scalloped border
